title: Aaliya Counts to Sleep
synopsis: Baby Aaliya counts soft, sleepy things from one to five as she gets ready for bed, discovering cozy blankets, gentle stars, and dreamy clouds that help her drift off to peaceful sleep.

illustration.description: Baby Aaliya with warm brown skin and curly black hair sits on a cozy bed, hugging a pale yellow blanket. Her round face shows contentment with sleepy eyes. The bedroom has soft lavender walls and a glowing bedside lamp casting golden light.
illustration.alt: Aaliya hugging a yellow blanket on her bed

illustration.description: Close-up of Aaliya's face showing her big brown eyes slowly blinking. Her chubby cheeks are rosy and peaceful. Soft peach and cream tones fill the background with gentle watercolor washes creating a dreamy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Close-up of Aaliya's sleepy blinking eyes

illustration.description: Aaliya looks out her window at three bright golden stars in a deep purple night sky. She presses her small hands against the glass window. The stars sparkle with soft white light rays extending outward in a gentle pattern.
illustration.alt: Aaliya looking at three twinkling stars through her window

illustration.description: Aaliya arranges four pastel pillows on her bed - one pink, one mint green, one cream, and one soft blue. She pats them gently with her tiny hands. The pillows are round and plump, creating a cozy nest-like arrangement.
illustration.alt: Aaliya arranging four colorful fluffy pillows on her bed

illustration.description: Aaliya lies on her back pointing up at five white puffy clouds visible through her skylight window. The clouds drift peacefully across a soft purple-pink sunset sky. Her expression shows wonder and sleepiness combined.
illustration.alt: Aaliya pointing at five fluffy clouds through her skylight

pages.text: Time to sleep now. Shh, shh!

illustration.description: Aaliya's mama, a woman with beautiful dark skin and braided hair, gently tucks Aaliya into bed. Both have peaceful, loving expressions. The room glows with warm amber light from a moon-shaped nightlight on the dresser.
illustration.alt: Aaliya's mama tucking her into bed with a gentle shh gesture

illustration.description: Aaliya sleeps peacefully under her yellow blanket, surrounded by her four pillows. Gentle Z's float above her head in soft white letters. The room is bathed in moonlight streaming through the window, creating a serene blue-silver glow.
illustration.alt: Aaliya sleeping peacefully with Z's floating above her head

pages.text: Good night, little one. Sleep tight!

illustration.description: Wide view of Aaliya's cozy bedroom showing her sleeping form as a small, peaceful bundle in the center of the bed. The five clouds are still visible through the skylight, now glowing softly in moonlight. Everything is calm and still.
illustration.alt: Peaceful wide view of sleeping Aaliya in her moonlit bedroom

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: How many stars did Aaliya see?
questions.explanation: Aaliya saw three little stars that went twinkle, twinkle!

questions.question: What color was Aaliya's blankie?
questions.explanation: Aaliya's soft blankie was yellow and perfect for snuggling!

questions.question: Who tucked Aaliya into bed?
questions.explanation: Mama gently tucked Aaliya into bed and said shh, shh!
